series_metadata.series_title: FIPSE - Fund for the Improvement of Postsecondary Education
series_metadata.series_description: Quality assessment and improvement proposals, correspondence, and information regarding administration of Federal Grant Funds.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 3 years after grant is completed and final audit report published; record center until audited by State Auditor and audit report is released, then destroy, Paper: Recycle
